page_metadata.biotools__summary: AdEPro (Animation of Adverse Event Profiles) is an app that (audio-)visualizes adverse events occurring in clinical trials. As this data is usually considered sensitive, this tool is provided as a stand-alone application that can be launched from any local machine on which the data is stored.
